bead.title: metrics: record routing intent by estimated difficulty
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Routing-intent evidence, metrics, docs, and shipped DDx skill references still describe route-shaped hints (`power:*`, `triage.power_hint`, `TriagePowerHintKey`, or SMART JUSTIFICATION). TD-037 now requires evidence and docs to use estimated difficulty and the mapped abstract power class.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:2738` records `inferred_power_class` without estimated difficulty.
- `cli/internal/agentmetrics/loader.go` and related tests project power-class fields but not estimated difficulty.
- `.agents/skills/ddx/reference/work.md` and shipped skill copies still mention `TriagePowerHint` in worker diagnostics.

PROPOSED FIX
Record routing intent as `estimated_difficulty` plus mapped `requested_power_class`. Update metrics projection fields and tests to report attempts/cost/success by estimated difficulty. Remove new-use SMART JUSTIFICATION fields from current evidence. Update active and shipped DDx skill references so they teach only `triage.estimated_difficulty` and do not describe `TriagePowerHintKey` or `power:*` as durable hints.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go`
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_routing_evidence_test.go`
- `cli/internal/agentmetrics/loader.go`
- `cli/internal/agentmetrics/types.go`
- `cli/internal/agentmetrics/loader_test.go`
- `.agents/skills/ddx/reference/work.md`
- `cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/skills/ddx/reference/work.md`
- docs touched by TD-037 if needed for consistency only

NON-SCOPE
- Do not change the Fizeau execution contract.
- Do not backfill old attempt records.
- Do not retain `SMART JUSTIFICATION` as a required current-run evidence field.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent ./internal/agentmetrics -run 'TestExecutionRoutingIntentRecordsEstimatedDifficulty|TestTryRecordsEstimatedDifficultyRoutingIntent|TestAgentMetricsLoadsEstimatedDifficulty|TestAgentMetricsRollupCountsEstimatedDifficulty' -count=1` passes.
2. `rg -n 'TriagePowerHintKey|triage\.power_hint|power:smart|power:hint|SMART JUSTIFICATION' .agents/skills/ddx cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/skills/ddx docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-037-bead-execution-hints.md docs/helix/06-iterate/bead-authoring-template.md` returns only explicit “do not use / historical” wording, not instructions to author new hints.
3. `ddx skills check .agents/skills/ddx cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/skills/ddx` passes.
4. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
